across.clue: Rude lout — like Putin, whom Zelenskyy accused of being when the Russian leader said 'don't call me old'
Ancient stringed instruments — like those evoked as Pope Leo arrives in secularized Spain to revitalize the faith
Performance reviews — like those Trump urged Pulte to conduct before firing intelligence community employees
Discourage — like the judge who blocked Trump's sweeping freeze on immigration benefits for 39 countries
Himalayan legend — like the missing Sherpa guide found alive on Everest after funeral rites had already begun

down.clue: Lost blood — like the chip sector, which 'bled' over $1 trillion in stock market value in a single day
Expression of dismay — like that of SpaceX ISS astronauts who had to take shelter as cosmonauts scrambled to fix an air leak
Speak publicly — like Lesley Stahl and colleagues who said they'll 'stay and fight' at 60 Minutes
Lease again — like the Kennedy Center, which lost a suit against an artist who canceled after Trump's name change
Antidepressant type, briefly — like the treatments the Trump administration is investigating alongside gender care at Mount Sinai
